MOKOUMOD-STRIKE_MOKOU.title: Strike
MOKOUMOD-DEFEND_MOKOU.title: Defend
MOKOUMOD-SELF_HARMING_KICK.title: Self-Harming Kick
MOKOUMOD-BREAK_TIME.title: Break Time
MOKOUMOD-DEVASTATING_KICK.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} [gold]Non-Lethal[/gold] HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-DEVASTATING_KICK.title: Devastating Kick
MOKOUMOD-FUJIYAMA_VOLCANO.description:
[gold]Burn[/gold] no longer decays on enemies.
Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to a random enemy 6 times.
MOKOUMOD-FUJIYAMA_VOLCANO.title: Fujiyama Volcano
MOKOUMOD-FEATHER.title: Feather
MOKOUMOD-BLAZING_BIRD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add {Feathers:diff()} [gold]{Feathers:plural:Feather|Feathers}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}): Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MOKOUMOD-BLAZING_BIRD.title: Blazing Bird
MOKOUMOD-BLAZING_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}): Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to them.
MOKOUMOD-BLAZING_SLASH.title: Blazing Slash
MOKOUMOD-BLAZING_SLASH.artist: かなりあと愉快な仲間たち
MOKOUMOD-BLAZING_STORM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} times.
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}): One more time each.
MOKOUMOD-BLAZING_STORM.title: Blazing Storm
MOKOUMOD-FURIOUS_PUNCH.title: Furious Punch
MOKOUMOD-PYROMANIAC.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Damage scales with your [gold]Burn[/gold].
Gain {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-PYROMANIAC.title: Pyromaniac
MOKOUMOD-FLAME_WHIRLWIND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies X times.
Damage scales with your [gold]Burn[/gold].
Gain X [gold]Burn[/gold].
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}): Double the value of X.
MOKOUMOD-FLAME_WHIRLWIND.title: Flame Whirlwind
MOKOUMOD-FIRE_PROTECTION.title: Fire Protection
MOKOUMOD-OVERWHELM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[red]Fury[/red]: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
MOKOUMOD-OVERWHELM.title: Overwhelm
MOKOUMOD-OVERWHELM.artist: かなりあと愉快な仲間たち
MOKOUMOD-RISE_FROM_ASHES.title: Rise From Ashes
MOKOUMOD-XU_FUS_DIMENSION.description:
Gain {RekindlePower:diff()} [gold]Rekindle[/gold].
At the end of combat, if there remains [gold]Rekindle[/gold], raise your Max HP by {XuFusDimensionPower:diff()}.
MOKOUMOD-XU_FUS_DIMENSION.title: Xu Fu's Dimension
MOKOUMOD-TRUE_FLAME_BARRIER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, apply {BurnBack:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to the attacker.
MOKOUMOD-TRUE_FLAME_BARRIER.title: True Flame Barrier
MOKOUMOD-INDISCRIMINATE_IGNITION.title: Indiscriminate Ignition
MOKOUMOD-SPONTANEOUS_COMBUSTION.descript:
Whenever you gain [gold]Burn[/gold], apply that much [gold]Burn[/gold] to ALL enemies.
At the end of your turn, gain {SpontaneousCombustionPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-SPONTANEOUS_COMBUSTION.title: Spontaneous Combustion
MOKOUMOD-VITALITY.title: Vitality
MOKOUMOD-INVIGORATE.title: Invigorate
MOKOUMOD-CAREFREE.title: Carefree
MOKOUMOD-ENDURE.title: Endure
MOKOUMOD-ENERGIZED_STRIKE.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} [gold]Non-Lethal[/gold] HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Enchant[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] with [gold]Vigorous[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-ENERGIZED_STRIKE.title: Energized Strike
MOKOUMOD-RESILIENCE.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} [gold]Non-Lethal[/gold] HP.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] it with [gold]Vigorous[/gold] if possible.
MOKOUMOD-RESILIENCE.selectionScreenPromp: Choose a card to put back in your Hand.
MOKOUMOD-RESILIENCE.title: Resilience
MOKOUMOD-CONSECUTIVE_KICKS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
[red]Fury[/red]: One more time.
MOKOUMOD-CONSECUTIVE_KICKS.title: Consecutive Kicks
MOKOUMOD-INCINERATE.description:
Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
Permanently increase this card's [gold]Burn[/gold] by {Increment:diff()}.
MOKOUMOD-INCINERATE.title: Incinerate
MOKOUMOD-FENG_WING_ASCENSION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply [gold]Burn[/gold] equal to half of total unblocked damage dealt.
MOKOUMOD-FENG_WING_ASCENSION.title: Feng Wing Ascension
MOKOUMOD-BUILD_UP.description:
Your next Attack this turn deals double damage.
[red]Fury[/red]: Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-BUILD_UP.title: Build Up
MOKOUMOD-TRINITY_SHIELD.title: Trinity Shield
MOKOUMOD-DISINTEGRATE.description:
Remove all [gold]Artifact[/gold] from the enemy. Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
[red]Fury[/red]: Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-DISINTEGRATE.title: Disintegrate
MOKOUMOD-FLAME_DANCE.title: Flame Dance
MOKOUMOD-SMOKE_AND_FEATHER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add {Feathers:diff()} [gold]{Feathers:plural:Feather|Feathers}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}): Add 1 more.
MOKOUMOD-SMOKE_AND_FEATHER.title: Smoke and Feather
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIXS_FEATHERS.description: At the start of your turn, add {PhoenixsFeathersPower:diff()} [gold]{PhoenixsFeathersPower:plural:Feather|Feathers}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIXS_FEATHERS.title: Phoenix's Feathers
MOKOUMOD-FLOWING_FLAME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}) or [purple]Ember[/purple]: Draw 1 more.
MOKOUMOD-FLOWING_FLAME.title: Flowing Flame
MOKOUMOD-TAUNT_MOKOU.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Enemy gains {TempStrength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
[red]Fury[/red]: Enemy loses {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-TAUNT_MOKOU.title: Taunt
MOKOUMOD-WARM_UP.title: Warm Up
MOKOUMOD-WING_BLAST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
[red]Fury[/red] or [purple]Ember[/purple]: Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MOKOUMOD-WING_BLAST.title: Wing Blast
MOKOUMOD-BLADE_OF_BLOOD.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} [gold]Non-Lethal[/gold] HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[purple]Ember[/purple]: Deal damage again.
MOKOUMOD-BLADE_OF_BLOOD.title: Blade of Blood
MOKOUMOD-SHIELD_OF_BLOOD.title: Shield of Blood
MOKOUMOD-RAPID_REGEN.title: Rapid Regen
MOKOUMOD-BLOOD_BOIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}) or [red]Fury[/red]: Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold] for each enemy hit.
MOKOUMOD-BLOOD_BOIL.title: Blood Boil
MOKOUMOD-FIRE_PROOF.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next time you lose HP from [gold]Burn[/gold], lose only 1 HP.
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}): The next 2 times instead.
MOKOUMOD-FIRE_PROOF.title: Fire Proof
MOKOUMOD-SOARING_KICK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Enchant[/gold] all your Attacks EVERYWHERE with [gold]Vigorous[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-SOARING_KICK.title: Soaring Kick
MOKOUMOD-HEEDLESS_DETONATION.description:
Gain {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
ALL enemies lose HP equal to {IfUpgraded:show:double |}your [gold]Burn[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-HEEDLESS_DETONATION.title: Heedless Detonation
MOKOUMOD-CRIMSON_WATCHGUARD.description: Whenever you play a Skill, gain {CrimsonWatchguardPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold]. If it is [gold]Enchanted[/gold], gain 1 more.
MOKOUMOD-CRIMSON_WATCHGUARD.title: Crimson Watchguard
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIX_FORM.description:
You lose at most 3 HP from [gold]Burn[/gold] at a time and no longer lose [gold]Burn[/gold] when revived from [gold]Rekindle[/gold].
At the end of your turn, apply {PhoenixFormPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to yourself and ALL enemies.
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIX_FORM.title: Phoenix Form
MOKOUMOD-FIVE_COLORED_TURTLE.description: At the start of your turn, gain {FiveColoredTurtlePower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold] and [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [gold]Vigorous[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-FIVE_COLORED_TURTLE.title: Five Colored Turtle
MOKOUMOD-POSSESSED_BY_PHOENIX.descriptio:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of cards.
Fill your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [gold]Feathers[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-POSSESSED_BY_PHOENIX.selectionS: Choose any number of cards to [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-POSSESSED_BY_PHOENIX.title: Possessed by Phoenix
MOKOUMOD-BAMBOO_SHOOT.title: Bamboo Shoot
MOKOUMOD-OFUDA.description:
[gold]Fuel[/gold]({Durability:diff()}): Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to ALL enemies.
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold]: ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
MOKOUMOD-OFUDA.title: Ofuda
MOKOUMOD-FIREWOOD.description:
[gold]Fuel[/gold]({Durability:diff()}): Add 1 random [gold]Cinder[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold]: Add 1 random [gold]Cinder[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-FIREWOOD.title: Firewood
MOKOUMOD-CHARCOAL.description:
[gold]Fuel[/gold]({Durability:diff()}): Draw 1 card.
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold]: Gain {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
MOKOUMOD-CHARCOAL.title: Charcoal
MOKOUMOD-SAKE.title: Sake
MOKOUMOD-BIRNAM_WOOD.description:
[gold]Fuel[/gold]({Durability:diff()}).
When Durability is 0: Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Tragic Fate+|Tragic Fate}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-BIRNAM_WOOD.title: Birnam Wood
MOKOUMOD-TRAGIC_FATE.description:
Attacks deal double damage this turn.
Die at the start of next turn.
MOKOUMOD-TRAGIC_FATE.title: Tragic Fate
MOKOUMOD-OLIVE_BRANCH.description:
[gold]Fuel[/gold]({Durability:diff()}): Gain 1 [gold]Essence[/gold] this combat.
When Durability is 0: Gain {RekindlePower:diff()} [gold]Rekindle[/gold] and {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-OLIVE_BRANCH.title: Olive Branch
MOKOUMOD-VALIANT_HEART.title: Valiant Heart
MOKOUMOD-FLARE.title: Flare
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIXS_TAIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}): Gain {RekindlePower:diff()} [gold]Rekindle[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this card.
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIXS_TAIL.title: Phoenix's Tail
MOKOUMOD-RAGING_INFERNO.title: Raging Inferno
MOKOUMOD-LIFE_SCATTERS_LIKE_MIST.descrip:
Die immediately.
You and another player draw cards until [gold]Hand[/gold] is full.
MOKOUMOD-LIFE_SCATTERS_LIKE_MIST.title: Life Scatters like Mist
Gain {RekindlePower:diff()} [gold]Rekindle[/gold].
This turn: intercept attacks for ALL allies, reflect unblocked damage you take to the attacker.
MOKOUMOD-IMPERISHABLE_SHOOTING.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Whenever you revive from [gold]Rekindle[/gold], [gold]Exhume[/gold] this card with doubled damage and [gold]Burn[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-IMPERISHABLE_SHOOTING.title: Imperishable Shooting
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIX_REBIRTH.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} [gold]Non-Lethal[/gold] HP.
Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Whenever you revive from [gold]Rekindle[/gold], [gold]Exhume[/gold] this card.
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIX_REBIRTH.title: Phoenix Rebirth
MOKOUMOD-HEATWAVE.description:
[gold]Feathers[/gold] now apply [gold]Burn[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Add {Feathers:diff()} [gold]{Feathers:plural:Feather|Feathers}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-HEATWAVE.title: Heatwave
MOKOUMOD-LEGEND_OF_IMMORTALITY.descripti:
Gain {RekindlePower:diff()} [gold]Rekindle[/gold].
Whenever you revive from [gold]Rekindle[/gold], gain {LegendOfImmortalityPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-LEGEND_OF_IMMORTALITY.title: Legend of Immortality
MOKOUMOD-ETERNAL_FREEDOM.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all non-Attack cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], [purple]Ember[/purple]: and {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold], for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-ETERNAL_FREEDOM.title: Eternal Freedom
MOKOUMOD-IMMORTAL_SMOKE.description: [gold]Exhume[/gold] a Skill. If it is a [gold]Fuel[/gold], add {Feathers:diff()} [gold]{Feathers:plural:Feather|Feathers}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-IMMORTAL_SMOKE.title: Immortal Smoke
MOKOUMOD-SELF_HARMING_TALONS.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Second Talon+|Second Talon}[/gold] with this card's [gold]Enchantment[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-SELF_HARMING_TALONS.title: Self-Harming Talons
MOKOUMOD-SECOND_TALON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Final Talon+|Final Talon}[/gold] with this card's [gold]Enchantment[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-SECOND_TALON.title: Second Talon
MOKOUMOD-FINAL_TALON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[red]Fury[/red]: Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to them.
MOKOUMOD-FINAL_TALON.title: Final Talon
MOKOUMOD-AGONYS_EMBRACE.description: Whenever you lose HP on your own turn, draw {AgonysEmbracePower:diff()} {AgonysEmbracePower:plural:card|cards}.
MOKOUMOD-AGONYS_EMBRACE.title: Agony's Embrace
MOKOUMOD-FEAR_NO_DEATH.description: Whenever you lose HP on your own turn, gain {FearNoDeathPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-FEAR_NO_DEATH.title: Fear No Death
MOKOUMOD-ESSENCE_STRIKE.title: Essence Strike
MOKOUMOD-HIGH_TEMP_FEATHERS.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}): [gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to {ExhaustUpTo:diff()} {ExhaustUpTo:plural:card|cards} and add that many [gold]Feathers[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-HIGH_TEMP_FEATHERS.selectionScr: Choose up to {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-HIGH_TEMP_FEATHERS.title: High-Temp Feathers
MOKOUMOD-SIPHONING_FLAME.description:
Remove enemy's [gold]Burn[/gold]. Gain 1 [gold]Regen[/gold] for every {Ratio:diff()} removed.
[gold]Ignite[/gold]({Ignite:diff()}): Add a [gold]Conjuring Flame[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-SIPHONING_FLAME.title: Siphoning Flame
MOKOUMOD-CONJURING_FLAME.title: Conjuring Flame
MOKOUMOD-UNDYING_PASSION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Enchant[/gold] this card and {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [gold]Vigorous[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-UNDYING_PASSION.title: Undying Passion
MOKOUMOD-RED_CINDER.title: Burning Cinder
MOKOUMOD-YELLOW_CINDER.title: Glowing Cinder
MOKOUMOD-BLACK_CINDER.description:
[gold]Fuel[/gold]({Durability:diff()}).
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold]: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, add a [gold]Void[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-BLACK_CINDER.title: Charred Cinder
MOKOUMOD-STOKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add {Cinders:diff()} random [gold]{Cinders:plural:Cinder|Cinders}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-STOKE.title: Stoke
MOKOUMOD-FAN_THE_FLAMES.description: Whenever a [gold]Fuel[/gold] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], apply {FanTheFlamesPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to a random enemy.
MOKOUMOD-FAN_THE_FLAMES.title: Fan the Flames
MOKOUMOD-BLAZING_BAMBOO_TUBE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Fuel[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-BLAZING_BAMBOO_TUBE.title: Blazing Bamboo Tube
MOKOUMOD-ETERNAL_FLAME.description: At the start of your turn, add {EternalFlamePower:diff()} random [gold]{EternalFlamePower:plural:Cinder|Cinders}[/gold] with 1 less Durability into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-ETERNAL_FLAME.title: Eternal Flame
MOKOUMOD-DESPERATE_CLAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {CalculatedHits} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times}.
[red]Fury[/red] or [purple]Ember[/purple]: [gold]Desperate Claw[/gold] cards hit 1 more time this combat.
MOKOUMOD-DESPERATE_CLAW.title: Desperate Claw
MOKOUMOD-BURNING_SOUL.title: Burning Soul
MOKOUMOD-REGRETFUL_LIFE.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} [gold]Non-Lethal[/gold] HP.
Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Reckless Sacrifice+|Reckless Sacrifice}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-REGRETFUL_LIFE.title: Regretful Life
MOKOUMOD-RECKLESS_SACRIFICE.description:
Deal damage equal to your missing HP.{InCombat:
(Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
MOKOUMOD-RECKLESS_SACRIFICE.title: Reckless Sacrifice
MOKOUMOD-INVERTED_INFERNO.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to {InvertedInfernoPower:diff()} {InvertedInfernoPower:plural:card|cards} and put that many from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-INVERTED_INFERNO.title: Inverted Inferno
MOKOUMOD-UNTIL_LIFE_BURNS_AWAY.descripti:
Lose ALL but 1 HP.
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for every {Ratio:diff()} HP lost.
Apply [gold]Burn[/gold] equal to HP loss to ALL enemies.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedEnergy} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, apply {CalculatedHpLoss:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold])|}
MOKOUMOD-UNTIL_LIFE_BURNS_AWAY.title: Until Life Burns Away
MOKOUMOD-WOUNDS_OF_METSUZAI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhume[/gold] 1 card for every {Ratio:diff()} unblocked damage dealt.
MOKOUMOD-WOUNDS_OF_METSUZAI.title: Wounds of Metsuzai Temple
MOKOUMOD-CURSE_OF_IWAKASA.description:
ALL debuffs applied to the enemy are doubled.
Add a [gold]Hellfire[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-CURSE_OF_IWAKASA.title: Curse of Iwakasa
MOKOUMOD-HELLFIRE.title: Hellfire
MOKOUMOD-HONEST_MANS_DEATH.description:
Apply [gold]Mark of Sin[/gold] to the target [gold]Boss[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal double damage against enemy not intending to attack.
MOKOUMOD-HONEST_MANS_DEATH.title: Honest Man‘s Death
MOKOUMOD-NIHIL.description: When [gold]Exhausted[/gold]: Add an [gold]Exist[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-NIHIL.title: Nihil
MOKOUMOD-EXIST.description: Add 1 stack to ALL your buffs.
MOKOUMOD-EXIST.title: Exist
